'''dhazasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loanin|loanin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loanin|loanin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhazasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæzæsæth|dhæzæsæth]] || [[word:dhæzæsæj|dhæzæsæj]] || [[word:dhæzæsæsh|dhæzæsæsh]] || [[word:dhæzæsæ|dhæzæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazazasath|dhazazasath]] || [[word:dhazazasaj|dhazazasaj]] || [[word:dhazazasash|dhazazasash]] || [[word:dhazazasa|dhazazasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazasath|dhazasath]] || [[word:dhazasaj|dhazasaj]] || [[word:dhazasash|dhazasash]] || [[word:dhazasa|dhazasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazafsath|dhazafsath]] || [[word:dhazafsaj|dhazafsaj]] || [[word:dhazafsash|dhazafsash]] || [[word:dhazafsaf|dhazafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhazasatha|dhazasatha]] || [[word:dhazasaja|dhazasaja]] || [[word:dhazasasha|dhazasasha]] || [[word:dhazasaka|dhazasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhazasath|dhazasath]] || [[word:dhazasaj|dhazasaj]] || [[word:dhazasash|dhazasash]] || [[word:dhazasa|dhazasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhazasathal|dhazasathal]] || [[word:dhazasajal|dhazasajal]] || [[word:dhazasashal|dhazasashal]] || [[word:dhazasakal|dhazasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhazasathatha|dhazasathatha]] || [[word:dhazasajaja|dhazasajaja]] || [[word:dhazasashasha|dhazasashasha]] || [[word:dhazasaka|dhazasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhazasathan|dhazasathan]] || [[word:dhazasajan|dhazasajan]] || [[word:dhazasashan|dhazasashan]] || [[word:dhazasakan|dhazasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhazasathaoro|dhazasathaoro]] || [[word:dhazasajaoro|dhazasajaoro]] || [[word:dhazasashaoro|dhazasashaoro]] || [[word:dhazasakaoro|dhazasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
